Id=redaction-worker.service
ActiveState=active
SubState=running
Description=Worker started with token=DOCKERMAP_TEST_FAKE_SYSTEMD_DESCRIPTION_TOKEN
FragmentPath=/etc/systemd/system/redaction-worker.service
LoadState=loaded
ExecStart={ path=/usr/bin/python3 ; argv[]=python3 /srv/app/worker.py --token=DOCKERMAP_TEST_FAKE_SYSTEMD_EXEC_TOKEN https://user:DOCKERMAP_TEST_FAKE_SYSTEMD_URL_TOKEN@example.test/app ; }
Requires=network-online.target redis.service
Wants=postgres.service
PartOf=worker.target
